# pfsense_wake_on_lan (Data Source)

Retrieves a single Wake-on-LAN entry by MAC address from pfSense.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_wake_on_lan" "server" {
  mac = "00:11:22:33:44:55"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mac` (String) MAC address of the device to wake.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the Wake-on-LAN entry.
- `interface` (String) Network interface for the Wake-on-LAN entry (e.g. 'lan', 'opt1').
